PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.swift$'; then swiftformat "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --quiet; swiftlint lint --path "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" --quiet; fi

hardRules: No telemetry, analytics, or crash reporting SDKs
No iCloud, cloud sync, or account system
API keys in Keychain only, never written to disk or logs
Air gap enforcement verified before every council run when enabled
No Combine in new code (AsyncStream only)
Never mutate a shipped migration (append new)
